title: (security): Update security.md to reflect the latest changes under the scope of our coverage
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: Securing the perimeter
gist.blurb: Updated our security policy to officially cover the SDK, MCP, and CLI. Keeping the hive safe and sound!
gist.summary: Updated the SECURITY.md file to expand vulnerability reporting coverage to include the SDK, MCP, and CLI tools.
gist.impact: Security researchers and contributors now have clear guidelines on reporting vulnerabilities for our newer developer tools.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a friendly security guard or inspector, examining a glowing shield or a secure document. Represents the updated security policy covering new tools.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny security guard hat, inspecting a glowing digital shield that protects a stack of documents. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny security guard hat, inspecting a glowing digital shield that protects a stack of documents.
